Every day, WITI’s group chats buzz with fresh links. As part of our new Saturday send for paid readers, we’re rounding up 11 of the best.
It’s WITI, on the weekend.
Why are these interesting?
New Zealand caps airport hugs at three minutes [ https://substack.com/redirect/e2d401a6-b125-4bc3-9e01-951e3a0664a0?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ] (The Guardian)
“There’s no space left for others,” Dunedin International Airport’s chief executive said. “It’s about enabling others to have hugs.”
Great Accidental Discoveries [ https://substack.com/redirect/7a5436a4-0195-409e-99f6-64b819e69b2d?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ] (Goethe Institute)
From the tea bag to the Post-it note.
People Are AI-Generating Marques Brownlee’s Voice to Promote Their Products [ https://substack.com/redirect/283de3fb-5830-4f14-afb6-17da20164033?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ] (X)
